const theme = {
    darkBackground:'black',
    lightBackground: '#101010',
    titleColor:'white',
    subTitleColor:'darkgrey',
    headerColor: '#ee2a4d',
    linkColor: 'darkgrey',
    linkHoverColor:'white',
    writings: 'darkgrey',
    borderRadius:'5px'
}

export default theme
